name: SnapOtter
description: SnapOtter is an open-source, self-hosted file manipulation suite with 200+ tools across images, video, audio, PDFs, and files. It includes batch processing, reusable pipelines, local AI tools, a browser image editor, and a REST API so files stay on your own server.
longDescription: SnapOtter is an open-source, self-hosted file manipulation suite with 200+ tools across images, video, audio, PDFs, and files. It includes batch processing, reusable pipelines, local AI tools, a browser image editor, and a REST API so files stay on your own server.
